description: Send notifications to your own Pushed destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise pushed:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway channel skips Apprise and POSTs a native Pushed JSON payload (app_key, app_secret, content) directly to api.pushed.co.
name: msg-to-pushed

request.template: {"urls":"pushed://${ customer_secrets.PUSHED_APP_KEY }/${ customer_secrets.PUSHED_APP_SECRET }","title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}

{"urls":"pushed://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.app_key_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.app_secret_secret }} }","title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}

{"app_key":"${ customer_secrets.PUSHED_APP_KEY }","app_secret":"${ customer_secrets.PUSHED_APP_SECRET }","target_type":"app","content":{* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..(((_body.title or "")~="" and (_body.body or "")~="") and ": " or "")..(_body.body or "")) *}}

{"app_key":"${ customer_secrets.PUSHED_APP_KEY }","app_secret":"${ customer_secrets.PUSHED_APP_SECRET }","target_type":"app","content":{* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..(((_body.title or "")~="" and (_body.body or "")~="") and ": " or "")..(_body.body or "")) *}}
